    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Wyll
    Together, we will make Baldur's Gate the brightest gem aside the Sword Sea. The Heart of the Gate will prevail.

    Variant 2

    Together, Wyll and I will make Baldur's Gate the brightest gem aside the Sword Sea. The Heart of the Gate will prevail.
    h837e9355gd622g4e4fg9e60g70998667e034 | 276165a6-804a-4a13-9c3c-ef37b2debbed | stub

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Wyll
    I had hoped you'd join me on the Council - but the Blade's spirit is indomitable. You are destined for greatness.
    hbcb247f3g0ee0g4fceg90f8g3b88e8bd1438 | 87ef5c88-b7dd-4791-870c-55a52567137d | stub

    I had hoped Wyll would join me on the Council - but the Blade's spirit is indomitable. He is destined for greatness.
    hf45991eeg7e95g44a3g8a3bg41597da9ff92 | e800240e-1a36-47bf-93ac-5555a8ea35fd | stub

    259.Duke Ulder Ravengard: The devil's stench lingers, my son. But you are yet a champion of the people. I had hoped you'd join me on the Council, but - you are your own man. I couldn't be prouder.WyllORI_Wyll_RavengardKnowsEndingGLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfAvernusAvatarCAMP_Ravengard_Event_HasMet_Final

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Wyll
    The devil's stench lingers, my son. But you are yet a champion of the people. I had hoped you'd join me on the Council, but - you are your own man. I couldn't be prouder.
    h6f1ed549g0947g4a36ga9e9g56a578676cbd | 7a8f9ef3-0663-4b7d-b1ed-f6174aa58357 | stub

          461.Player: I pulled you from death's grip, and this is how you thank me?WYR_Ravengard_State_Resurrected

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • WYR_Ravengard_State_Resurrected {86c9572d-84e7-b407-0ce6-84fd263418a1} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c3b2e3e0-f9a2-b83a-2b16-39c3b7f6346aSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hc9d9d04bg69d5g46cega774g97c809d8728bText UUID: 54f8f6c6-92aa-45d4-b831-5bd941cf8584Show Once: True
          • +
            521.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You want my gratitude? Fine - take your fill. But I will not celebrate this infernal resurrection.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: df493582-bcd3-ee0f-f26f-72ff650ecf95Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h111bd9f3gb1edg476dga130g7616c2bc0e79Text UUID: 0768a3be-d271-43e5-bf2f-ab518d723355Timeline Phase Index: 87Timeline Dialog Node UUID: df493582-bcd3-ee0f-f26f-72ff650ecf95Timeline Phase Duration: 9.69sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • •

        • +
          162.Player: It isn't what you think, father. It never was.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 47e7796f-4c36-08d8-3147-1dafa0bc9d8eSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hd6942e92g0bcdg43f4g9799gd8d60a52ed96Text UUID: 7ee29767-d086-488a-97cd-4400cd74d6e8Show Once: True

            Metadata

            Node Type: AliasUUID: 7b7e427e-7563-906d-47e0-d1b4b9cf65f1Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)
            • +
              585.Duke Ulder Ravengard: It is exactly what I think.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ff9d52d9-1c4e-3b7c-a307-c20dc1f7fe9eSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h86e2f197g9339g4c44gb5f5gb36d7627d0aaText UUID: e05b6262-cbf7-4c09-84da-96b71f24c870Timeline Phase Index: 84Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ff9d52d9-1c4e-3b7c-a307-c20dc1f7fe9eTimeline Phase Duration: 3.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                2.Narrator: *Your head tingles. Memories flow through your mind, seeking escape.*

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0145de00-a405-6c22-dd9a-6009fbf51e47Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h241006ffg07d7g4bc5g8b8egfc474b22116bText UUID: 74edd002-101b-4758-8fea-c18f62e5a849Timeline Phase Index: 65Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0145de00-a405-6c22-dd9a-6009fbf51e47Timeline Phase Duration: 5.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  50.Player: I sacrificed my soul to save yours. I had no choice.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 17ad9814-9a29-2e8b-999e-63d075668444Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hf90f9d5fg1ebbg41e4ga350gc591358ee362Text UUID: 52cf1227-45d8-41c7-b3ad-d83e511360c4Show Once: True
                  • +

                    Node Type: AliasUUID: c65faccf-be8f-3dc2-a314-37ee7fd9518bSpeaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                    • +
                      338.Narrator: *There is no stopping it: the truth bubbles over, flooding first your mind, then your father's.*note: Mind meld. Ravengard and Wyll touch their own heads.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 90ba75e8-079c-6130-68a8-55949b99216cSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h340a2a1fg9e50g415egbedfge9bdf10dc028Text UUID: 27cd49d9-d2a4-4a03-b5d1-1120370d8436Timeline Phase Index: 50Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 90ba75e8-079c-6130-68a8-55949b99216cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

                            541.Narrator: *Ravengard sees Mizora and her infernal sisters. He sees the agony in your face as an impossible choice is set before you.*

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb1e1dde-102a-401a-10b6-c46768fe12daSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h7bc95778g823dg49bcgbf3egf04e4ae4f900Text UUID: 7c8baeef-7e8c-4575-90a6-56240d48786eTimeline Phase Index: 73Timeline Dialog Node UUID: eb1e1dde-102a-401a-10b6-c46768fe12daTimeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                              • +
                                378.Narrator: *The past becomes present. Your father sees you partner with Mizora to defeat Tiamat's cultists before they could lay siege to Baldur's Gate.*

                                    • +
                                      429.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Wyll - my son. I'm so sorry. I didn't know.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b8d9fbb8-467b-3f5a-be3b-b8978618b916Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hff2a34e0g4df8g4b7dga4e1g5c8ec3a4cf64Text UUID: fa116d4e-c770-4da6-a574-bfbeb378f892Timeline Phase Index: 92Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b8d9fbb8-467b-3f5a-be3b-b8978618b916Timeline Phase Duration: 13.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: b8d9fbb8-467b-3f5a-be3b-b8978618b916Group Index: 0
                                      • +
                                        503.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You sold your soul to save Baldur's Gate - and I cast you out for it.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d8c6b7ec-4a63-8803-0854-0b35af47ce70Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h9403d7c3ga81eg4d25gab01g5b907ef9db74Text UUID: 059fa4f4-9a9c-4f24-b305-d8de2c57be74Group ID: b8d9fbb8-467b-3f5a-be3b-b8978618b916Group Index: 1

                                            • +
                                              4.Player: There's nothing to forgive. You only wanted to protect the city.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0180c949-dd0b-3aea-835b-a4c0efbfa77eSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hbd7094bag5d58g452cg8b5aga1cd5b35d0b9Text UUID: 95524f8f-ec83-45df-bac7-d4f107869696Show Once: True
                                              • +
                                                573.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You are a better man than most, and a better son than I deserve. I'll yet make amends, but -

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa730a43-593c-f703-ade9-cd1a92d39e8aSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h661e2d6dg8b83g4de6gafe4g4fc2e4215471Text UUID: 8d5cf063-778a-4142-bf60-fb17a7149020Timeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fa730a43-593c-f703-ade9-cd1a92d39e8aTimeline Phase Duration: 16.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: fa730a43-593c-f703-ade9-cd1a92d39e8aGroup Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  108.Duke Ulder Ravengard: - my duty is first and foremost to the city and its people. There's something I must ask of you.CAMP_Ravengard_Event_HasMetWyll

                                                              430.Player: The wyrm is dead, but his spirit lives within me. I am the Heart of the Gate, the Blade of Frontiers!GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiersORI_Wyll_RavengardKnowsEnding

                                                                                              325.Narrator: *Baldur's Gate is your home, and you are its servant, relentless in your pursuit of the greatest good. You would sooner die by Mizora's hand than endanger the city.*

                                                                                                                425.Narrator: *Your father's courage is an inspiration. You will make a name for yourself, you will conquer all of the city's ills. The people will know you forever as the Heart of the Gate.* [End]

You will make a name for yourself, you will conquer all of the city's ills. The people will know you forever as the Heart of the Gate.*
                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            234.Player: What makes you so sure the people will welcome me as a duke?!Wyll's Fiendish Form

                                                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            195.Player: I am no aristocrat. I am the Blade of Frontiers, eternal protector of the Sword Coast.!Wyll's Fiendish FormORI_Wyll_RavengardKnowsEndingGLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers

                                                                                            Flags and Tags

                                                                                            • +
                                                                                              82.Narrator: *When evil's shadow darkened the Sword Coast, you brought your light. You are the people's protector. To fell monsters and guard the meek is your calling.*

                                                                                      457.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You showed me that you are the future of Baldur's Gate - and well beyond it.

                                                                            • +

                                                              • +
                                                                296.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Courage. Insight. Strategy. Justice. The ones I made you recite every morning. The ones you'll call on in the days to come.

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 804fdd23-aa23-41c0-aaf8-99043458f33aSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hb72fe853ge553g467fg99f6g84882e3831afText UUID: 95bd4754-7b0b-4a16-9dee-9fc948996eecTimeline Phase Index: 41Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 804fdd23-aa23-41c0-aaf8-99043458f33aTimeline Phase Duration: 12.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                      345.Jump to Node 387

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 94420f80-479d-c49a-caf4-d7068ca5837aJump Target: Node 387 (a883982b-8746-060c-0064-f72d0f214702)Jump Target Point: 1
                                            • +
                                              265.Player: I can forgive you. But I can never forget.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 720ecfee-aa46-40c0-6aac-125319296b4dSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h26ec0ca3ga6bdg4bacga6f6g8ce97429b788Text UUID: 411be966-d19b-4a8c-897b-133aec573a69Show Once: True
                                              • +
                                                135.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Nor should you. The self is the sum of its experiences. You are the man you are because of them.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 397e8590-c5cf-2f95-5b9c-a997e2afb49eSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h3e91a631g02b1g4c04g885fg8e0fcc469387Text UUID: 70d8e72c-ce01-4f08-baf6-eae3bd6c1f34Timeline Phase Index: 130Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 397e8590-c5cf-2f95-5b9c-a997e2afb49eTimeline Phase Duration: 11.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                • See Node 573 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) You are a better man than most, and a better son than I deserve. I'll yet make amends, but -
                                            • +
                                              297.Player: Maybe.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 80660145-cae5-ac64-f286-e28780936669Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h3fd7cc93g809dg4bd0gab4dgd51fd1b07831Text UUID: 5b2338ab-060e-4375-8aa7-bed9c32020beShow Once: True
                                              • +

                                                Metadata

                                                • See Node 573 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) You are a better man than most, and a better son than I deserve. I'll yet make amends, but -

                                              • +

                          255.Duke Ulder Ravengard: By Tyr's wounds - I'm in your mind...

                            348.Narrator: *The Grand Duke sees Mizora and her infernal sisters. He sees the agony in Wyll's face as an impossible choice is set before him.*

                                571.Narrator: *The past becomes present, and Wyll's thoughts are laid bare. Ravengard sees Wyll partnering with Mizora to defeat Tiamat's cultists before they could lay siege to Baldur's Gate.*

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa202066-2ab2-c9fb-e1ca-534e7d8b2193Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hbc7a6933gc1a8g4d75g8afdgf5eac1618215Text UUID: 070a7291-f839-4d31-919b-9bf1de00ca3aTimeline Phase Index: 82Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fa202066-2ab2-c9fb-e1ca-534e7d8b2193Timeline Phase Duration: 13.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                • +

                                      217.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Wyll.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e929b2f-bffd-b78b-dd2f-8e9634fa8f76Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h32ee1b20ge055g4cadgafdcg22f3c229efcdText UUID: 72aaae33-01c8-4753-8d81-c790c84f33e8Timeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e929b2f-bffd-b78b-dd2f-8e9634fa8f76Timeline Phase Duration: 1.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Addressed Speaker: 1
                                      • +
                                        538.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Everything I did, I did for Baldur's Gate. I did for you.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9de10eb-ab4e-1948-2965-ddd97cf330b3Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc101993ag33a4g4244gaa10g6ba36b842997Text UUID: 41bba51b-348f-4742-a50d-b28ed5db10d8Timeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e9de10eb-ab4e-1948-2965-ddd97cf330b3Timeline Phase Duration: 7.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Addressed Speaker: 0
                                        • +
                                          176.Player: It's the truth, Ravengard. Wyll has always been a faithful defender of Baldur's Gate.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4f875fb8-328b-e111-5bb7-db3c02975f09Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h4c612191g965fg4d53ga9bbg8d467a301de2Text UUID: 9ebc09e8-f48f-408f-82cf-b5e2f60be80bShow Once: True
                                          • +
                                            42.Duke Ulder Ravengard: My son, you sold your soul to save Baldur's Gate - and I cast you out for it.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 13ccc468-0ea3-3044-6db1-12d02a29a6f8Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hf356c077g739cg49a0gaf9fgcbff1d57fa2dText UUID: 4b25e94a-d12b-4b4d-a950-876981e22cfcTimeline Phase Index: 149Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 13ccc468-0ea3-3044-6db1-12d02a29a6f8Timeline Phase Duration: 8.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                                            • +
                                              118.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You gave yourself to the Hells' eternal fires so I might walk free.Wyll's Fiendish Form

                                              Flags and Tags

                                              checktype Tag | speaker 1 Origin_Intro_Wyll
                                              • Wyll's Fiendish Form {5e844f0e-d822-4210-a28e-6af149a7bd4b} = True

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 33f572bc-a11c-822d-f35e-c17613271ab1Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h57ba88fbg0ccbg47eagb190gc8ead56faa7cText UUID: a2bb84b2-741f-492c-a80e-d22074e8cc86Timeline Phase Index: 128Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 33f572bc-a11c-822d-f35e-c17613271ab1Timeline Phase Duration: 6.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: TrueAddressed Speaker: 1
                                              • +
                                                260.Duke Ulder Ravengard: By the gods, can you ever forgive me?

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 711c864e-b253-29fa-bae0-6099cb8b659bSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h34a0d2b7g9a54g46ceg96dag6569eae1aaffText UUID: eef8b85c-3ced-4083-8d14-8f8890dd0889Timeline Phase Index: 168Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 711c864e-b253-29fa-bae0-6099cb8b659bTimeline Phase Duration: 7.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                                                • +
                                                  405.Origin_Intro_Wyll: There's nothing to forgive. You wanted to protect the city. I only ever wanted the same.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ae538bf8-14c0-c496-a685-501a14e65639Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h5de55c5ag3921g466dgaffdg679b54ae0ab5Text UUID: be2309bd-53d0-458e-8268-fb1816adceb3Timeline Phase Index: 40Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ae538bf8-14c0-c496-a685-501a14e65639Timeline Phase Duration: 6.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Addressed Speaker: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    380.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You are a better man than most, and a better son than I deserve. I'll yet make amends, but -

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a47fdb07-6a32-e8bf-3c64-c455521c62c7Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h407d9a66g030dg4ab3g95a1g1c5cb35f209fText UUID: 7b4aaaed-f13c-48f9-a7dd-77695ae0d044Timeline Phase Index: 36Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a47fdb07-6a32-e8bf-3c64-c455521c62c7Timeline Phase Duration: 9.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      544.Duke Ulder Ravengard: - my duty is first and foremost to the city and its people. There's something I must ask of you.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ed81aa51-4496-1d96-d06f-5b2553ed7299Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h918b3fd0g292ag4742ga170g2ff6f57dc8c6Text UUID: d67dc645-ef8f-4cc4-b4d2-77d5577b061aTimeline Phase Index: 75Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ed81aa51-4496-1d96-d06f-5b2553ed7299Timeline Phase Duration: 7.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • +
                                                        119.Player: Go on.CAMP_Ravengard_Event_LeftWyrmConvoEarl

                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                        settype Global
                                                        • CAMP_Ravengard_Event_LeftWyrmConvoEarl {4cb280a3-434e-ea14-a155-6cccba2b8c7b} = True

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 34420ab4-060b-6a5b-86f7-93bc1e264d6aSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h36936446gf8e9g4ebcg8a93g0933ccfdff19Text UUID: c2d4fb00-49b0-4961-8bd2-365a66132f50Show Once: True
                                                        • +
                                                          438.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Before I was captured, I was on a mission.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bc3b8fd2-e3fa-0a1c-03d2-0ba95ff8a0f8Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hdaefaad2gefefg4103gba30ge9b5f689d405Text UUID: 58b750b8-a71e-46d8-b35c-36ef0dd42fe9Timeline Phase Index: 94Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bc3b8fd2-e3fa-0a1c-03d2-0ba95ff8a0f8Timeline Phase Duration: 3.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                          • +
                                                            534.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Returning from Elturel, I discovered the plans of the Absolutists. I immediately realised the city couldn't defend itself against such an army.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e7182bdd-4088-c4cb-e415-a746d38a0497Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h706a2b90gc96bg41f7g8097g5db2fd1e4e3cText UUID: a670a3ee-83e6-47ab-bf8b-cc4cb82ce4d6Timeline Phase Index: 70Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e7182bdd-4088-c4cb-e415-a746d38a0497Timeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                            • +
                                                              107.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I didn't despair because the city has a secret guardian, a wyrm that sleeps beneath. He can be called upon in times of great need.

                                                              Metadata

                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2feeb5b9-b4fd-9c6a-5eb5-52d436239063Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hfbf71433g1a6fg4b5cg8d4fg36d71ef86c86Text UUID: 0acf2e2b-f3b1-4d74-bacf-5e85225a4a87Timeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2feeb5b9-b4fd-9c6a-5eb5-52d436239063Timeline Phase Duration: 11.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                              • +
                                                                508.No Speaker: Alias to Node 254GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiersORI_Wyll_RavengardKnowsEnding

                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                checktype Global
                                                                • GLO_Wyll_State_BladeOfFrontiers {8c46322f-7965-94c7-1318-62c391f1c8f1} = True
                                                                settype Global
                                                                • ORI_Wyll_RavengardKnowsEnding {35158151-37d6-0151-e54c-3eda27d643ae} = True

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: AliasUUID: da150b9a-941f-a4bc-dfb8-114dec4a8f11Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                                                                • +
                                                                  254.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Do you mean Ansur? The wyrm is dead, father. Where we might have once found a friend, we found only his bones, animated by an old grievance.CAMP_Ravengard_Event_TurnedInQuest

                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                  settype Global
                                                                  • CAMP_Ravengard_Event_TurnedInQuest {d7e46c3c-e6a1-b962-d7c8-04fa3eaa2242} = True

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6ef63b31-7a09-04cc-1964-a4e3e749b7feSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6617747agaa94g4b57gaa0cgba669110a87dText UUID: a58f11c0-53f3-4f9b-9141-fa7954d9f952Timeline Phase Index: 166Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6ef63b31-7a09-04cc-1964-a4e3e749b7feTimeline Phase Duration: 12.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                  • +
                                                                    447.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But the Heart of the Gate still lives - in me, in my allies.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bfd666d3-bade-e079-a448-d5b4bc64d5b2Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb2af714cg51b2g429dg94b5g2f1ee212f6d6Text UUID: 092e1e82-3dcd-4a1b-a7d4-44352a551890Timeline Phase Index: 98Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bfd666d3-bade-e079-a448-d5b4bc64d5b2Timeline Phase Duration: 6.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                    • +
                                                                      417.Origin_Intro_Wyll: In Ansur's defeat, I've found my spirit renewed. For as long as the Sword Coast needs a champion, I've vowed to answer its call.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b494ddbf-8d22-e06b-92fe-ab8b29a43d9eSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb4831448g7a11g4858g8f3agc72dd03bbc61Text UUID: 1cd687a6-e61a-434b-a374-6061f7125b51Timeline Phase Index: 99Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b494ddbf-8d22-e06b-92fe-ab8b29a43d9eTimeline Phase Duration: 9.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                      • +
                                                                        445.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am the Blade of Frontiers!

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bf07d7cb-6cb7-577d-4e3c-5378b0618269Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h9f402c47gefe5g4075ga639g572a67798733Text UUID: 18390c9b-f01a-4204-8f95-6e1a42e6b245Timeline Phase Index: 97Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bf07d7cb-6cb7-577d-4e3c-5378b0618269Timeline Phase Duration: 2.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                                    • +
                                                                      111.Origin_Intro_Wyll: In Ansur's defeat, I've found my spirit renewed. For as long as devils and demons imperil the Sword Coast, they will be my prey.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3138b74c-f7e7-f868-473a-94612ce6765dSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h53c30e64gb535g4914ga965ge872c6eea33fText UUID: 7fe16451-8b15-408b-9219-d2ffd55880fcTimeline Phase Index: 125Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3138b74c-f7e7-f868-473a-94612ce6765dTimeline Phase Duration: 9.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                      • +
                                                                        379.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am the Blade of Avernus!

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a44df32d-8b7c-9c38-5bbe-9b56af8154d1Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd661f06bg58c4g4685g8a2cg2f99be3f0f02Text UUID: 1be86e0f-880d-4fa6-ad45-4db1517ba107Timeline Phase Index: 54Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a44df32d-8b7c-9c38-5bbe-9b56af8154d1Timeline Phase Duration: 3.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                                    201.No Speaker: Alias to Node 535

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: AliasUUID: 593d5aeb-b226-1cce-2b6d-859efe30dadeSpeaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                                                                    • +
                                                                      535.Origin_Intro_Wyll: In Ansur's defeat, I've found my spirit renewed. Once I've vanquished the Absolute, I will walk in your footsteps and lead the city as a Grand Duke.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e759b5a2-9180-aeb9-0f66-138d61e25d6aSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hcf92fec9g5468g47dcg823bg88bedea1669cText UUID: edcd19fc-3d4b-4d2b-a184-7b8c0a5a7e45Timeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e759b5a2-9180-aeb9-0f66-138d61e25d6aTimeline Phase Duration: 10.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                      • +
                                                                        554.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am Wyll Ravengard, son of Ulder!

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f3146328-e0dd-e39d-0f59-74b09135f82bSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h224684c0g4278g420eg9b8ag4cc1c7ebed0dText UUID: 735efc4c-3da5-4f10-92bc-45e66aff3516Timeline Phase Index: 79Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f3146328-e0dd-e39d-0f59-74b09135f82bTimeline Phase Duration: 4.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                        • +

                                                                            178.No Speaker: Alias

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                            Node Type: AliasUUID: 4fffc4e9-6b71-b7aa-f6a6-cd83b59d695bSpeaker: -1 (No Speaker)Unmapped Attributes: endnode
                                                              • +
                                                                279.Duke Ulder Ravengard: This is such a time. You've been trained in the ways of the great champions and proven to be one of them. The wyrm will answer your call. You must seek him out.GLO_State_KnowsAboutWyrm

                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                settype Global
                                                                • GLO_State_KnowsAboutWyrm {bcbce515-d3e8-c0c9-49ce-20925eabf90e} = True

                                                                Metadata

                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7982f416-87a1-441f-2367-0be2ec27789fSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hd1169293ge53bg4749ga57eg669d2cafcdc4Text UUID: 137fa225-5ade-4490-85cc-e69561feca52Timeline Phase Index: 177Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7982f416-87a1-441f-2367-0be2ec27789fTimeline Phase Duration: 13.85sTimeline Phase Shots: 4
                                                                • •
                                                                  476.Jump to Node 524

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: JumpUUID: cafa8cb6-4399-f554-c999-4be30fefde90Jump Target: Node 524 (dfd6086c-4893-ac80-daab-c96463c548a7)Jump Target Point: 1
                                                                • +
                                                                  249.Player: A wyrm? Are you saying there's a dragon living under the city?!WYR_SkeletalDragon_State_Defeated

                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                  checktype Global
                                                                  • WYR_SkeletalDragon_State_Defeated {bafbffed-bb3f-43b0-a006-7bac257a633c} = False

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6b1af640-3245-a881-fdc4-9d09eb4e7c71Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h581bbb9dg4042g4bacga2bcg1a0800f4b90eText UUID: b6e151cc-588a-4e0b-80f5-7b0cf3aa8c90Show Once: True
                                                                  • +
                                                                    72.Duke Ulder Ravengard: A bronze dragon, yes. He sleeps beneath us even now, awaiting a hero to rouse him.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1e6df963-053e-c2b0-0a2b-a0f3ae949a4cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h0d40a72ege523g493ag9151ge8e9e7d413d1Text UUID: 5ba54298-ca92-4d47-8bb9-9346d67853d9Timeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1e6df963-053e-c2b0-0a2b-a0f3ae949a4cTimeline Phase Duration: 8.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Addressed Speaker: 2
                                                                    • +
                                                                      472.Duke Ulder Ravengard: The wyrm goes by many names. Ansur. The Waiting Storm. The Heart of the Gate.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c98366a3-49ea-7aaa-b3a8-9cbd7887380bSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h4592a70eg5323g452bg8409gb54b8b01bb5aText UUID: 59b338d4-d615-4645-bd13-ffe94bb47ae7Timeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c98366a3-49ea-7aaa-b3a8-9cbd7887380bTimeline Phase Duration: 9.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Addressed Speaker: 2
                                                                      • +
                                                                        223.Duke Ulder Ravengard: He promised Balduran he'd protect the city if ever its existence was threatened. But just the once.

                                                                        Metadata

                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 605db3fc-10eb-2cf7-3e55-465cf46c63ecSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hf8ec690dg67b8g466fga2f5ga2471a19055eText UUID: 12868cc3-47c5-4ca6-8b0e-30f337791a4aTimeline Phase Index: 182Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 605db3fc-10eb-2cf7-3e55-465cf46c63ecTimeline Phase Duration: 8.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                        • +
                                                                          294.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Since then, the city has faced countless threats, but we always overcame. There was never a need to call on the wyrm - until now.

                                                                          Metadata

                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7fc2f3f7-e0d1-bd4d-9881-bf1a18b1121cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h0dbe9f1fg3e5ag4cd2g9f70g79cea9f68e2aText UUID: c8bd2b4f-b969-474b-bdf2-e6e083456fc0Timeline Phase Index: 96Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7fc2f3f7-e0d1-bd4d-9881-bf1a18b1121cTimeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                          • +
                                                                            163.Duke Ulder Ravengard: The Absolute is the greatest threat Baldur's Gate ever faced. The wyrm must be awakened - and the task falls to you.

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4811e7b7-ad68-6ab1-01e8-a20d95b59722Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hd088f004gee93g4017g99efg4c05ac28e9cfText UUID: cafb365c-484c-4379-ba95-f0d2a2a18d46Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4811e7b7-ad68-6ab1-01e8-a20d95b59722Timeline Phase Duration: 11.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                                                                            • +
                                                                              434.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Take this - 'The Legend of Ansur'. An ancient epic, ill-remembered, dismissed as a mere tale.WYR_AnsurGhost_State_HasAnsurBookWYR_AnsurGhost_Event_GiveAnsurBook

                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                              checktype Object | speaker 0 Duke Ulder Ravengard
                                                                              • WYR_AnsurGhost_State_HasAnsurBook {e0aebfc7-5496-4b2d-aeb6-bcd17c9c275a} = True
                                                                              settype Object | speaker 2 Player
                                                                              • WYR_AnsurGhost_Event_GiveAnsurBook {2205be22-1109-47e5-854a-8a6835971218} = True

                                                                              Metadata

                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bacaacb3-b69a-2189-02ed-f3cc40ff00f1Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h2e63b02bg77f9g4166ga755ga172a80a37dfText UUID: b482a11a-f10e-4b63-be07-00b22105660bTimeline Phase Index: 93Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bacaacb3-b69a-2189-02ed-f3cc40ff00f1Timeline Phase Duration: 14.54sTimeline Phase Shots: 3
                                                                              • +

                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    382.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I failed, father. The wyrm is fallen.

                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a5541f8f-d479-eec4-912c-ed3113d5d913Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h02b86a76g0658g489dgbdf3gfae2b72445abText UUID: 7a00c5cd-17d2-4d4f-864f-bc80fd6f66dcTimeline Phase Index: 31Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a5541f8f-d479-eec4-912c-ed3113d5d913Timeline Phase Duration: 4.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      381.Duke Ulder Ravengard: A terrible fate for Ansur, my son. Yet my hopes for the city's future have never been higher.CAMP_Ravengard_Event_TurnedInQuest

                                                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                                                      settype Global
                                                                                      • CAMP_Ravengard_Event_TurnedInQuest {d7e46c3c-e6a1-b962-d7c8-04fa3eaa2242} = True

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a4cbc765-979a-8dd5-cd86-b95ebb201196Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h624c1006g02f2g41cfga83egaa81b392fe91Text UUID: aef2675f-ff1c-41ef-b0bd-ebcd259457cbTimeline Phase Index: 29Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a4cbc765-979a-8dd5-cd86-b95ebb201196Timeline Phase Duration: 7.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        12.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I don't understand.

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 05418083-879d-5f39-2dec-238945e7f228Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hf348a94fg3bddg4bcbg971bg516eaa993695Text UUID: 3d573674-1eeb-41f8-b9d4-e8d1284020e6Timeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 05418083-879d-5f39-2dec-238945e7f228Timeline Phase Duration: 1.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                        • +
                                                                                          281.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You and your allies slayed the undead terror that was once the great Ansur. You are stronger than even the great wyrm.

                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79dc256a-03ed-6b84-ee2e-760610403716Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h2c632307g1e9fg4ae1gb0f8g8adcb54e064dText UUID: 82796f25-53c7-41c7-97e3-9988ed35eadeTimeline Phase Index: 179Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 79dc256a-03ed-6b84-ee2e-760610403716Timeline Phase Duration: 11.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Addressed Speaker: 1
                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            243.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You will be the one to part the storms and lead the people through. You, not Ansur, are the saviour we need.

                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 67df48fe-0a1f-d380-51ec-dc4b50edf1c2Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hd217b78cgc539g424dgac6bgb4fbbe7bfd78Text UUID: d59e6424-0cd5-4dba-bea9-e1e21d08bb1eTimeline Phase Index: 162Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 67df48fe-0a1f-d380-51ec-dc4b50edf1c2Timeline Phase Duration: 10sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Addressed Speaker: 1
                                                                                            • +
                                                                                              339.Duke Ulder Ravengard: First, you will fell the Absolute. Then, we will rebuild Baldur's Gate, we will take back our city - together.

                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 90be1a54-a6e9-5763-5637-88ad78bfd09bSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h1b7f25aage485g45b4ga236ge6afad0f622fText UUID: 4d87cf4b-3088-4904-b4fb-af1b34f9c475Timeline Phase Index: 47Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 90be1a54-a6e9-5763-5637-88ad78bfd09bTimeline Phase Duration: 10.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Addressed Speaker: 1
                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                353.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I will name you Baldur's Gate's newest Grand Duke of the Council. You will be hailed Heart of the Gate.

                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 98044ab1-efca-326e-3f93-a48c172b626dSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h55ab4696gaa3eg4fc2g953dg4237695ebac0Text UUID: 8cb91686-024f-4fc1-b825-265d75a6db9fTimeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 98044ab1-efca-326e-3f93-a48c172b626dTimeline Phase Duration: 10.63sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                  333.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Grand Duke? I look the part of a fiend. A half-devil possesses my very soul.!CAMP_MizorasPact_State_WyllReleasedFromPactWyll's Fiendish Form

                                                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    426.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I will tell the citizens and the patriars of your good works. They will know you carry your father's banner.

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b76e7b9e-2a0f-e76d-fbd2-0ee2f8301a16Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: ha2c70e84g123eg485dga65dgb51bbafbd5aeText UUID: dd8befd8-726a-479d-b3c6-70a24d821a80Timeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b76e7b9e-2a0f-e76d-fbd2-0ee2f8301a16Timeline Phase Duration: 6.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                    • +

                                                                                                        • +

                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                            Node Type: AliasUUID: c42881b3-4bb3-eb17-031b-57ff65128b3dSpeaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              20.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I fought to right the wrongs of the Coast, to slay the men and monsters that hunt the helpless.

                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08d56706-47ff-e48a-df6b-5700f2efe085Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he8fbceebgcc73g4d78g849ag61a7bf08c433Text UUID: cd7c5975-4b8d-4beb-9537-dae022cdd89fTimeline Phase Index: 144Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 08d56706-47ff-e48a-df6b-5700f2efe085Timeline Phase Duration: 6.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                245.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It is in the wilds that I find my courage, not in the halls of Upper City estates.

                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6a54b7ad-482b-f860-5139-8efdb4dd4ea4Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc0b33477g49d7g4ebeg994dg3c7137ec39f5Text UUID: d1a7e823-7f91-4197-b901-0107166dc0bdTimeline Phase Index: 163Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6a54b7ad-482b-f860-5139-8efdb4dd4ea4Timeline Phase Duration: 6.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                  248.Origin_Intro_Wyll: There will be no Grand Duke Wyll Ravengard. And there will be no Blade of Frontiers.

                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6b02c623-a4cc-269b-587b-2acff83104cfSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hce9b31adg299fg47f6gbda3g2c61a43a28b1Text UUID: 2fc0c1a1-03fb-4b8d-9fb8-fa96869e36aeTimeline Phase Index: 164Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6b02c623-a4cc-269b-587b-2acff83104cfTimeline Phase Duration: 15.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 6b02c623-a4cc-269b-587b-2acff83104cfGroup Index: 0
                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                    527.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am now the Blade of Avernus.

                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e295f276-0bec-a5d1-6270-dbaf31354eb4Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h2d0fa0f9gea47g4d7bg8571gafc620c727b4Text UUID: 9a2be02f-4384-4d2a-ac86-008b341df5fbGroup ID: 6b02c623-a4cc-269b-587b-2acff83104cfGroup Index: 1
                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                      340.Origin_Intro_Wyll: For as long as demons and devils imperil the Sword Coast, they will be my prey.

                                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 91983f02-8387-08e1-02d0-846ebe297d1dSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h50997be2g149dg4969g968dgd25f56a64671Text UUID: ff000e5c-5a0c-4e85-ba62-f5440ac7ebe7Group ID: 6b02c623-a4cc-269b-587b-2acff83104cfGroup Index: 2
                                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                                        533.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Then go with my blessing. Be Faerûn's great defender.

                                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e716d94d-4aca-157b-6551-79115a9c75f2Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hb6dbeb0cg9385g4617gbd58g74f7758c849aText UUID: 21ffeb40-f800-4009-9174-242bf7b7caa5Timeline Phase Index: 69Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e716d94d-4aca-157b-6551-79115a9c75f2Timeline Phase Duration: 4.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                                          460.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Courage. Insight. Strategy. Justice. Let these be the lights that guide you, my son. Hail the Blade of Avernus!

                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              440.Origin_Intro_Wyll: He's right and we both know it. No manner of duke should be tied to a devil's leash.MaleFemale

                                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                              • Male {8f74d144-041e-4035-a9ac-72f41fc32de7}
                                                                                                              • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f}

                                                                                                              Text

                                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Male
                                                                                                              He's right and we both know it. No manner of duke should be tied to a devil's leash.
                                                                                                              h4c757d2bg5717g4503g9811ge3a83ebd5163 | d3fad715-b411-463b-9d64-dd5c27e5cee8 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Female
                                                                                                              She's right and we both know it. No manner of duke should be tied to a devil's leash.
                                                                                                              hf7e35ebegdffbg421egb75aga1eab368de8a | d3689d32-e4e6-48ab-b94a-646f8159996b | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                                              They're right and we both know it. No manner of duke should be tied to a devil's leash.

                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                413.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No manner of duke should save a city, only to open a gate to the Hells.

                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2db8250-7721-05a0-e7d3-526e764a5dddSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb58f1615g3fe1g4da7g9163g29d67f680489Text UUID: 18263aab-b238-4252-bb0f-1537db2d3f41Timeline Phase Index: 53Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b2db8250-7721-05a0-e7d3-526e764a5dddTimeline Phase Duration: 5.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                                                • See Node 248 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) There will be no Grand Duke Wyll Ravengard. And there will be no Blade of Frontiers.
                                                                                                        • +

                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              337.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Courage. Insight. Strategy. Justice. These were the lessons my father taught me.

                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8fdc0107-5d93-e1ed-a20b-efbd0615cb6dSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h206b69dfg1cdeg4c47g8558g2daf4674c80eText UUID: 6de22a8b-defe-4e27-8924-0f4d8d1d0863Timeline Phase Index: 192Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8fdc0107-5d93-e1ed-a20b-efbd0615cb6dTimeline Phase Duration: 31.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: 8fdc0107-5d93-e1ed-a20b-efbd0615cb6dGroup Index: 0
                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                202.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Baldur's Gate is my home, and I am its servant. I will be relentless in my pursuit of the greatest good.

                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5965d437-ab4d-c3b3-0f65-76c5a3289c70Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7631fdf9ga91bg4c8bgbc66g6fe7bdeb02bbText UUID: 90b3777d-140a-4c5c-91d9-2fb834914908Group ID: 8fdc0107-5d93-e1ed-a20b-efbd0615cb6dGroup Index: 1
                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                  220.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I would sooner die by Mizora's hand than let her endanger the city. I'll figure out a way.

                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f691437-8197-39c8-0d9b-ebbdecd004ceSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h175ff9eag1d47g48c0g982dg61d34a083f58Text UUID: 11616c65-9c6a-43f6-8037-fd38b646ebefGroup ID: 8fdc0107-5d93-e1ed-a20b-efbd0615cb6dGroup Index: 2
                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                    566.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The Blade of Frontiers is no more. I will be Wyll Ravengard, son of Ulder, proud Duke of Baldur's Gate.

                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f72457f3-fd84-6ae9-76b0-55e2359a9ad6Speaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he8429f01g98b5g4251g9064gd608cd5328c4Text UUID: 5ae46ae9-bf5f-4371-a8da-08a3ad38c280Group ID: 8fdc0107-5d93-e1ed-a20b-efbd0615cb6dGroup Index: 3
                                                                                                                    • +

                                                                                                    59.Duke Ulder Ravengard: But what, Wyll?

                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1aab2eb6-efab-adcc-06cb-54e2d2ef5ff1Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: ha9804a58g0a0cg4e36gb50fg9996ab7395f2Text UUID: c33acb12-3102-4466-ac8a-b522d1e25e3dGroup ID: 390ec300-e0db-d6a2-2081-c81fba3d525aGroup Index: 1
                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                      468.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I have slain monsters, faced illithids, guarded the helpless. To be a duke - is this the destiny I've awaited? Is the nobility my calling?

                                                                                • +
                                                                                  258.Player: Wouldn't you rather wake the dragon yourself?

                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 706bad88-c908-488b-52a1-1ba9c3e7294cSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h2d50697bg5a66g4079g8246g5cb86fceef3eText UUID: 8c49a965-916e-4ef5-a2ca-efb11d1ca894Show Once: True
                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    101.Duke Ulder Ravengard: The legend has it that Ansur will only answer to a proven hero of the city. Until a moment ago, I thought that was me.

                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2dbc519f-9f1b-1113-eef6-ed4229120110Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h7376db9fg9fcdg493bg8890g0d5c22719d9cText UUID: a336410f-794f-452f-9e88-7a348fcc0470Timeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2dbc519f-9f1b-1113-eef6-ed4229120110Timeline Phase Duration: 10.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      156.Duke Ulder Ravengard: But is he who rejects his own child a hero? What of he who calls his brave son a monster?

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4653f16d-ebd1-54d7-3a82-fc4bd7232f53Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h80045b33g5f74g47d4g838cg244e6555dd21Text UUID: 62fc6d00-cb53-43b0-85ef-d5f737526775Timeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4653f16d-ebd1-54d7-3a82-fc4bd7232f53Timeline Phase Duration: 7.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        392.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You showed me the truth. You showed me that I was the one who turned his back.

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aa85e3f5-bbc9-a312-2e52-e7bb8e15ba6aSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h9fe4e273gbbcdg4d61g8483gb644e4066adcText UUID: b486f69b-f0a1-4377-8538-49306bd19709Timeline Phase Index: 32Timeline Dialog Node UUID: aa85e3f5-bbc9-a312-2e52-e7bb8e15ba6aTimeline Phase Duration: 8.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                        • •

                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    505.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Thank you.

                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d96e09d9-4000-6208-1893-27f0581f61c1Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h2b2296a4g8cb9g4d94g8fa1g0fc5f1420bfaText UUID: aeb1e61c-4b08-4c50-a83f-672090397d3bTimeline Phase Index: 89Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d96e09d9-4000-6208-1893-27f0581f61c1Timeline Phase Duration: 2.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                    • •
                                                                                      386.Duke Ulder Ravengard: And may the city know the truth of my only son. Pride of Ravengard, pride of Baldur's Gate. [End]

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a86ce408-cd7b-3fb4-ff80-f924da81427cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hd2a1ad87g5a38g44d0g847dgf0e4fed0bdd8Text UUID: 2659eef9-ee26-4214-b788-bc7e6389cc1aTimeline Phase Index: 208Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a86ce408-cd7b-3fb4-ff80-f924da81427cTimeline Phase Duration: 9.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
                                                                                • +
                                                                                  335.Player: Wyll? What do you make of this?

                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8dd3ce4b-1b8a-bdc7-c019-df39ee90b256Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h1393dde1gb121g485fgbdcegb40dc32845f9Text UUID: 628818ad-e387-47f1-a178-c619da73a379Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: e1772f63-51d5-41f4-917c-cd957d59727a
                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    497.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Baldur's Gate stands on the brink of the abyss. My father was clear: we awaken the wyrm, and take back the city.!WYR_SkeletalDragon_State_Defeated

                                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                                    checktype Global
                                                                                    • WYR_SkeletalDragon_State_Defeated {bafbffed-bb3f-43b0-a006-7bac257a633c} = False

                                                                                    • +

                                                                                • +
                                                                                  141.Player: Please. You're staking the city's future on a fairy tale.

                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3a5e62e0-3d67-f857-dffd-d2f2b2e8ee1dSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h6afe4ee6g7b80g48afgb26fg1bed30888114Text UUID: 6bd2fcff-47d3-4868-ad16-5d3503ba7c71Show Once: True
                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    393.Duke Ulder Ravengard: A history told by Balduran himself, passed from Grand Duke to Grand Duke, stretching a thousand years back. It is no fable - it is plain truth.

                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aae7a187-844d-58f2-8927-2ae7f217c85cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hd6609389g4ec7g405egac56g2da0f7376f51Text UUID: 7506e898-a9ca-481d-b314-9f06ae503ee5Timeline Phase Index: 33Timeline Dialog Node UUID: aae7a187-844d-58f2-8927-2ae7f217c85cTimeline Phase Duration: 14.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      582.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Today, you've earned my trust. I know you will do right by me when the time comes.

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fe7cba02-dd14-6eda-265c-186b8bcb2988Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h6d9acbe5g228ag4616gaecagd8eda1fa0ff3Text UUID: c34464d4-6b59-46c0-a544-1b0c289949f4Timeline Phase Index: 83Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fe7cba02-dd14-6eda-265c-186b8bcb2988Timeline Phase Duration: 6.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                                      • See Node 103 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) May the city know the truth of my only son. Pride of Ravengard, pride of Baldur's Gate.
                                                                                • +

                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    142.Duke Ulder Ravengard: A great warrior knows when to contain the storm and when to release it.

                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3b4e4097-4117-69b2-2d7d-41e414677bc0Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h9473eb83g0e54g48a5g9e1bg4e803322d4bcText UUID: 8a68c88f-9a34-48dc-af89-ae4897ea4edeTimeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3b4e4097-4117-69b2-2d7d-41e414677bc0Timeline Phase Duration: 5.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                                                                            • +
                                                                              306.Duke Ulder Ravengard: There is a tome - 'The Legend of Ansur'. An ancient epic, ill-remembered, dismissed as a mere tale.!WYR_AnsurGhost_State_HasAnsurBook

                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                              checktype Object | speaker 0 Duke Ulder Ravengard
                                                                              • WYR_AnsurGhost_State_HasAnsurBook {e0aebfc7-5496-4b2d-aeb6-bcd17c9c275a} = False

                                                                              • +
                                                                                550.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I once held a copy, but it was stolen. Find it, let it set the path before you.GLO_Wyll_Event_RavengardWyrmwayQuest

                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                settype Global
                                                                                • GLO_Wyll_Event_RavengardWyrmwayQuest {a0383a14-5576-656c-1030-2439279ffc82} = True
