                                                                • +
                                                                  174.Player: What lessons do you mean?

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4eb4d7e9-2f75-c33d-51fc-5a670f3996beSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h0800d2cagb40cg414eg9f88gd0c039a62bf5Text UUID: abde16c5-4c69-473c-9e7e-9c110115891cShow Once: True
                                                                  • +
                                                                    433.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Courage. Insight. Strategy. Justice. I remember them well. You made me recite them every morning.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: babb0665-e5f9-42bd-d35f-a4029f4e582eSpeaker: 1 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha038597dgcef9g4770gb9f1g6521c4d418e4Text UUID: a044cceb-0626-40c1-a9d2-4dac998e426dTimeline Phase Index: 147Timeline Dialog Node UUID: babb0665-e5f9-42bd-d35f-a4029f4e582eTimeline Phase Duration: 17.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: babb0665-e5f9-42bd-d35f-a4029f4e582eGroup Index: 0Addressed Speaker: 0
                                                                    • +
                                                                      31.Duke Ulder Ravengard: So you do. And I thought you'd abandoned them, more fool me.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0dbc9f44-faba-b848-b593-e9fae1326cbdSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h109d0d59gd565g4a84g82f2g5e83f74e1dc0Text UUID: 58bca25a-76d2-4e00-9be8-32ff3096f851Group ID: babb0665-e5f9-42bd-d35f-a4029f4e582eGroup Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 1
                                                                      • See Node 472 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) The wyrm goes by many names. Ansur. The Waiting Storm. The Heart of the Gate.
                                                                • +
                                                                  373.Player: Waking a dragon doesn't sound like a good idea.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a27960c9-f13d-dd1d-a201-3a3a4daca95eSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h33b5fdf3gc424g42adg8104g5a327fe9cfdeText UUID: 003167f4-b491-46e1-8ffd-0c725d2eedcaShow Once: True
                                                                  • +
                                                                    477.Duke Ulder Ravengard: This is no ordinary dragon.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cc805f16-0177-eabc-640c-161b925278faSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h73adc21bgb17cg4288g97baga53045f79b17Text UUID: 73d4de60-ec21-4e1a-bec4-b59a81fd06ddTimeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cc805f16-0177-eabc-640c-161b925278faTimeline Phase Duration: 3.42sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                                    • See Node 472 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) The wyrm goes by many names. Ansur. The Waiting Storm. The Heart of the Gate.
                                                      • +
                                                        324.Player: Let's talk later.CAMP_Ravengard_Event_LeftWyrmConvoEarl

                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                        settype Global
                                                        • CAMP_Ravengard_Event_LeftWyrmConvoEarl {4cb280a3-434e-ea14-a155-6cccba2b8c7b} = True

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 89117970-d33a-a326-2023-bb8a2071a8f4Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hcc97c697g67f2g4cf7gb0a4g5621dd38ef0bText UUID: 5e44a06b-cc17-4065-a1c9-09da211b9dafShow Once: True
                                                        • •
                                                          387.Duke Ulder Ravengard: As you say - but not too much later. I know a way to defeat the Absolute. And it lurks in the darkness below the city's streets. [End]

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a883982b-8746-060c-0064-f72d0f214702Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h38e34c4bg58e9g4b3fga2e6g65b9dac16129Text UUID: d27f3d79-b4e7-4145-9cb8-a339d3cfde58Timeline Phase Index: 207Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a883982b-8746-060c-0064-f72d0f214702Timeline Phase Duration: 12.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 2End Node: True
                                        • +
                                          479.Player: It's time you two made up. We've got a city to save.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cebb3a73-5de9-f51f-3cbb-6abb8aae06fdSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h8e4af93dgc0bbg4397g9a71g583e488d1de1Text UUID: 81807137-193a-4dbe-95a7-74724e70eee6Show Once: True
                                          • +
                                            266.Duke Ulder Ravengard: All too right.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 729dcdba-bee8-5c10-a1b0-3aa54b9cd50dSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h63ffc0eega9a8g463ega5d1g9222a004433bText UUID: c7c13a12-13f8-4d7a-bcb2-d18c926e1b29Timeline Phase Index: 171Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 729dcdba-bee8-5c10-a1b0-3aa54b9cd50dTimeline Phase Duration: 2.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Addressed Speaker: 2
                                            • See Node 42 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) My son, you sold your soul to save Baldur's Gate - and I cast you out for it.
                                        • +
                                          293.Player: Heh. I bet you feel like a real bastard right about now.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7faef203-1761-0c4b-2617-0c2e004972bbSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h8136163dgaecbg47a2gaabdgca548cfb26bbText UUID: d9b301c3-1f2f-44d8-ae8a-a1bf418b6aa7Show Once: True
                                          • +
                                            366.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I do. And I should.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e9a64cf-3f4c-47d8-ee81-b415df6757d3Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h3654671dgbd49g40b1g9460gab71c2354e0bText UUID: 4b5d28b6-e67d-4997-9085-bdecb9fa77a1Timeline Phase Index: 56Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9e9a64cf-3f4c-47d8-ee81-b415df6757d3Timeline Phase Duration: 4.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Addressed Speaker: 2
                                            • See Node 42 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) My son, you sold your soul to save Baldur's Gate - and I cast you out for it.

                198.Player: Your son sacrificed his soul to save yours. He had no choice.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 583d6231-cf05-3576-f95d-eeb69cd4da96Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h5bc9e83eg2ee6g4babgb3f1g060623667b02Text UUID: 92699744-43b1-4e58-90ff-4c8af06bf1e3Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 52e23c1c-eb47-48aa-98ff-5b2c0b724343
                • +

                  • See Node 557 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Father, please - there's something I must show you.
              • +
                560.Player: Wyll's devoted his life to protecting the Coast. He's used his power wisely.

                Metadata

                • +

                  • See Node 557 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Father, please - there's something I must show you.

        199.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Is this my fate - to be freed from Gortash's hell only to be trapped in yours?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 58c98f62-63e7-f053-6fcc-a9d5f441dc2bSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h93ac2a8fg255eg4d33ga821g4d3937a182feText UUID: 2b052e7e-d512-4e96-848c-d72ccff023aaTimeline Phase Index: 196Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 58c98f62-63e7-f053-6fcc-a9d5f441dc2bTimeline Phase Duration: 7.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 7 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) It isn't what you think. It never was.
    • +

      67.Narrator: *The world spins as Ravengard's dizziness flows into you.*note: Small mind meld just for this one node.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1daa5084-5e3e-3f03-1c1d-8c5f9f43d3a2Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h443f0d1bg8578g4887g99e1g94d0c2e9c8dbText UUID: 904a96dc-859a-4a37-a361-2c988b7346a4Group ID: fdcdf2f3-7759-1994-2350-426603d8f90fGroup Index: 1
      • +
        261.Emperors: His mind is his own, but the elder brain touched him deeper than most. He must stay here - he will need time to recover.MINDMELDTELEPATHY

        Flags and Tags

        tagstype node | speaker 3 Emperors
        • MINDMELD {4874959b-4811-4b89-8f55-85fe04fbcd61}
        • TELEPATHY {ad247b59-d101-4f04-99ef-471c65678662}

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 711ee8f5-0825-65f7-ce1a-dbbcfd0bdad0Speaker: 3 (Emperors)Text Handle: h3dd37c97ge653g48f8gbc9fg522051cc3b20Text UUID: e936c2b7-6c71-40a6-a270-1c1b4a5a55c6Group ID: fdcdf2f3-7759-1994-2350-426603d8f90fGroup Index: 2
        • +
          329.Duke Ulder Ravengard: The voice is gone, but I still hear its echoes - reflections of reflections.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8b75d6b0-6cea-023c-627d-04e3400c158eSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h59d266dcg0e59g4de3g9f19g8e1fb321f854Text UUID: d4a8122e-4d51-42b0-9ced-86cf2d05b1b4Group ID: fdcdf2f3-7759-1994-2350-426603d8f90fGroup Index: 3
          • +
            120.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Godsdamned Gortash - he'll suffer for this. I'll drive Balduran's sword straight through his belly.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 344d9d23-1d53-1509-760e-54c66d8eed93Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h34dd4f55gb323g4aa3ga252gbf996d28890eText UUID: 28af45de-b96a-45ca-8812-412fa3809dadGroup ID: fdcdf2f3-7759-1994-2350-426603d8f90fGroup Index: 4
            • +
              204.Player: Gortash is done for. It was a long time coming.GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedKarlach

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Global
              • GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeated {74dd56ff-7e00-42a6-a0f3-0d122f364769} = True

              • +
                25.Duke Ulder Ravengard: So the bastard's gone? A shame I never... ngh...

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0acbd44a-3e37-6123-e17b-05c278f73438Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h35674a74g58f1g4153gbc7dg5d0045844dc0Text UUID: ed18d9b3-d518-432b-bdf6-01ebf8a3cd39Timeline Phase Index: 146Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0acbd44a-3e37-6123-e17b-05c278f73438Timeline Phase Duration: 8.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                • +
                  191.Narrator: *Your parasites link. Pain splits your head, and you hear a distant voice, a whisper of a memory. It calls for you. All of you...*

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54fc0767-a745-ea1e-aa3d-c1d303da1823Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h6ae99201gc7bbg4fe5gbe46gab14b14ab949Text UUID: 987acdae-d3a5-4b3d-988e-5e06bcb5e3c0Timeline Phase Index: 184Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 54fc0767-a745-ea1e-aa3d-c1d303da1823Timeline Phase Duration: 30.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 54fc0767-a745-ea1e-aa3d-c1d303da1823Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    228.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I saw your mind. That thing's still in me - and there's one in you. I don't understand.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 633f74cc-37f8-63fb-55ff-7c56db832b35Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h9cee41cegc284g452fgaa15gc825ec42c21bText UUID: c33929fc-19f7-4804-be78-bfbaa70b24b8Group ID: 54fc0767-a745-ea1e-aa3d-c1d303da1823Group Index: 1
                    • +
                      277.Emperors: Relax your mind. I will show him.MINDMELDTELEPATHY

                      Flags and Tags

                      tagstype node | speaker 3 Emperors
                      • MINDMELD {4874959b-4811-4b89-8f55-85fe04fbcd61}
                      • TELEPATHY {ad247b59-d101-4f04-99ef-471c65678662}

                      • +
                        519.Player: Let the Emperor reveal your memories.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: de9b2fdd-47d5-2e68-2ca7-6b67acce4012Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h09f4ef38ge134g4049gb571gdee931a4c839Text UUID: 223eef92-789c-429d-b103-2421721313edShow Once: True
                        • +
                          167.Narrator: *Ravengard gasps as his thoughts consume yours. He sees everything - the nautiloid journey, the perilous path to Moonrise, the Astral Prism, and the Emperor within.*

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ae54a21-ebca-8bd5-b9c4-4494ac0cba46Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h890edaddga34bg4596g86b0g8e3e36c6b3cfText UUID: c51224e3-8b5c-4859-bab8-98a8f6d07508Timeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4ae54a21-ebca-8bd5-b9c4-4494ac0cba46Timeline Phase Duration: 23.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 4ae54a21-ebca-8bd5-b9c4-4494ac0cba46Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            290.Duke Ulder Ravengard: By the Hells, my life hinges on a mind flayer's whim, and Baldur's Gate hangs from its talons.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7ed88476-6388-57ce-4d01-697b5455f242Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hafad0bd9g3c62g4e45gb7bfg97a3493e0e4bText UUID: 10d6010d-8fb0-44a7-97ba-0c22e19d8261Group ID: 4ae54a21-ebca-8bd5-b9c4-4494ac0cba46Group Index: 1
                            • +
                              219.Duke Ulder Ravengard: It seems the fate of the city lies in your hands.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f14deee-31cd-7b05-4e36-7f46dab9ce56Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hd1316ea8g250dg448agaaefg4a2747b11541Text UUID: 6e1ab865-4f4f-4379-97b2-f472aa0eb99fTimeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5f14deee-31cd-7b05-4e36-7f46dab9ce56Timeline Phase Duration: 19.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 5f14deee-31cd-7b05-4e36-7f46dab9ce56Group Index: 0
                              • +
                                512.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Please - promise that you'll be the shield that defends, the sword that slays, and the hammer that rebuilds. Be our champion.

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: db72a377-d979-70f9-3799-fd3ae1beaed9Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h7e0fde93ga7cfg4384g9ec9g8e98ea388a1bText UUID: b1e57982-16df-4501-9b84-8bec193109deGroup ID: 5f14deee-31cd-7b05-4e36-7f46dab9ce56Group Index: 1
                                • +

                                                  578.Player: No. And I'm not about to.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fc853657-5bbb-e3f5-c896-971c8e6c7281Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h0df5d7c7g2b52g4801gb6a0g758c0cc3200eText UUID: db282128-4606-44b4-a7c5-5ef9f3175621Show Once: True
                                                  • +
                                                    184.Duke Ulder Ravengard: You've done so much for me - I can't blame you for refusing. But I hope you'll reconsider.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 517b817c-1de5-ce5e-7e07-ebfaa513513dSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h24f14f2fgefecg4fcbg8352gef88ff69155aText UUID: 1062e0eb-858d-40bc-911e-0a9e79016adeTimeline Phase Index: 188Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 517b817c-1de5-ce5e-7e07-ebfaa513513dTimeline Phase Duration: 7.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                    • See Node 342 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) Florrick's a great friend to our family and the city. She'll make a stalwart ally for you.
                                        • +

                                            283.Duke Ulder Ravengard: She's... gone? Hells.

                                            Metadata

                                            • +
                                              98.Duke Ulder Ravengard: She was more than an ally. She was a friend, a confidante, a blessing to our family. She deserved a better fate than death.Wyll

                                              Flags and Tags

                                              ruletagtype rule

                                                164.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Dearest Florrick. May your journey to the Fugue Plane be a peaceful one.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 49ba21c0-5eb2-2219-27a1-e06ad9bb5da0Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hac98210bgf710g49a8gaac0g465346af4adaText UUID: ee47efb9-d2c9-4637-a5b6-403f7eb10fa8Timeline Phase Index: 159Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 49ba21c0-5eb2-2219-27a1-e06ad9bb5da0Timeline Phase Duration: 9.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                        • +
                                          286.Player: How did the Absolute cultists capture you?!CAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedAboutAbductionCAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedAboutAbduction

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          checktype Object | speaker 2 Player
                                          • CAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedAboutAbduction {1dd420ac-c62a-0c66-b8f2-553379eb85ee} = False
                                          settype Object | speaker 2 Player
                                          • CAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedAboutAbduction {1dd420ac-c62a-0c66-b8f2-553379eb85ee} = True

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7c9d1d28-159e-138b-ec12-0765dff4662bSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h04e76454gdb6cg41f8gaae7g92f7f1877f81Text UUID: f65f53d0-8ecb-4f80-be56-3ba4cabf9c61Show Once: True
                                          • +
                                            269.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I was returning from Elturel. My travelling party stopped at an inn - Waukeen's Rest - to lay our heads.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 74ac3f28-e9ef-623c-79c2-2c167008e6b1Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hb6da3fb4g0dceg4c85ga6efg80b453bb6db3Text UUID: b3b5400e-bb77-40fc-99b2-5afaeb2524b7Timeline Phase Index: 173Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 74ac3f28-e9ef-623c-79c2-2c167008e6b1Timeline Phase Duration: 26.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 74ac3f28-e9ef-623c-79c2-2c167008e6b1Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              539.Duke Ulder Ravengard: It wasn't the heat that woke me - it was the scent. Cultists had set fire to the place. I don't remember being taken, just the smoke burning my throat before I fell.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eabc524c-7107-f1a2-c622-bed5a7af3db0Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h3bb16e9egfd9dg4cb3ga614g3dc9f222f948Text UUID: c62ca5d4-165d-4d72-934f-e06cd84303b0Group ID: 74ac3f28-e9ef-623c-79c2-2c167008e6b1Group Index: 1
                                              • +
                                                161.Duke Ulder Ravengard: If only Florrick - oh hells, Florrick!!GLO_Florrick_State_PermaDefeated!CAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedToFreeFlorrick

                                                444.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I awoke in Moonrise Towers, inside one of those damnable pods. The rest -

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: befb3425-eb5d-db8a-a2c2-4a0dc641577aSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hc536c398g258eg4890g89cbg06bf0ffada14Text UUID: ff9c0846-a05e-433f-8f4c-2a3be7ae8c1eTimeline Phase Index: 142Timeline Dialog Node UUID: befb3425-eb5d-db8a-a2c2-4a0dc641577aTimeline Phase Duration: 12.72sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: befb3425-eb5d-db8a-a2c2-4a0dc641577aGroup Index: 0
                                                • •

                                            458.Duke Ulder Ravengard: A complicated one.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c2e60036-a614-8c49-f8b4-fbdd6026096cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hafd497d7g7558g4ec7g98beg8daf42a38f2fText UUID: b3f93be1-43c0-49c4-8dd1-4aec804da40dTimeline Phase Index: 169Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c2e60036-a614-8c49-f8b4-fbdd6026096cTimeline Phase Duration: 12.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: c2e60036-a614-8c49-f8b4-fbdd6026096cGroup Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              263.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I went to greet Elturel's High Overseer - only for the archdevil Zariel to drag the city into the Hells.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 718bdf96-9c7c-1b92-9920-6bb947f8a86aSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h38a2a5d9g6923g44adga001ga856cfd7e236Text UUID: 07e0389a-ad96-46f0-a5a0-4a3052ec30d1Group ID: c2e60036-a614-8c49-f8b4-fbdd6026096cGroup Index: 1
                                              • •
                                                17.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I, too, have been touched by Avernus, my boy. A tale for other places, other days.Wyll

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 2 Player
                                                • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 06f0e5f4-3df5-4783-1bca-3609633ad013Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h419d9a74g41d9g4649gac5fgc608c7a9edf1Text UUID: 4d5736ff-3cf1-489d-b13d-214c3f6e35deTimeline Phase Index: 143Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 06f0e5f4-3df5-4783-1bca-3609633ad013Timeline Phase Duration: 10.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                              • •
                                                32.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I have been touched by Avernus, been a plaything for demons. A tale for other places, other days.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0dc9c06f-03b4-e8c6-21f5-8b04c5208481Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h4e84b73bgecdbg4ef8g9752g707c27f32d01Text UUID: b19551a7-b636-4515-9c58-4f4145ea7a4fTimeline Phase Index: 148Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0dc9c06f-03b4-e8c6-21f5-8b04c5208481Timeline Phase Duration: 12.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                        • +
                                          436.Player: What happens to Baldur's Gate when the Absolute falls?!GLO_Origin_PartOfTheTeam_Wyll!CAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedAboutFutureCAMP_Ravengard_Event_AskedAboutFuture

                                          • +
                                            49.Duke Ulder Ravengard: To start with, a reckoning.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hf7511cafgedd0g4426g8e6fg435c6b315016Text UUID: 9a76c2dc-6b34-4dbe-bd5b-c1adb6a2ca87Timeline Phase Index: 151Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaTimeline Phase Duration: 40.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaGroup Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              251.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Even before I was infected, the dukes and patriars applauded as Gortash took control.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6d40ebc7-5863-d4d9-2d81-9358ba3a774eSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h1ec73382gb650g4275ga268g640bf1d78069Text UUID: 0c1b2a65-1e82-45b4-8ec7-6a8130a06b8eGroup ID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaGroup Index: 1
                                              • +
                                                221.Duke Ulder Ravengard: They cheered as his automatons marched the streets, lauded his tyranny of steel in the interest of security.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f87ec60-a2b4-d078-45ac-127be82b6cadSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h2e57b230g2f52g4e8dga178g7cc5b88be966Text UUID: 8114943a-9726-46f7-b1b5-fb820a694fdaGroup ID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaGroup Index: 2
                                                • +
                                                  421.Duke Ulder Ravengard: I will rebuild the city. But first, I will tear down the Council and start anew.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b61d9a2e-66e4-209a-0c9b-14a24def8403Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h7229277cgd63bg4df2g8451g18cbe1f19956Text UUID: 430a6e81-4165-44d2-a8a5-aabad3ee2dbeGroup ID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaGroup Index: 3
                                                  • •
                                                    377.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Those who would give up the freedom of the people to purchase temporary safety deserve neither power nor liberty.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a2fc497e-440c-b406-6229-980e85ac9fe4Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h0b20dc28g4074g49b7ga0d0g86dd9c7ca8afText UUID: ee0bf3b2-7ece-497e-8fb7-cafbcfc2b74bGroup ID: 1789664e-c0ba-5ffd-94e9-3b04fc92fbcaGroup Index: 4
                                        • +
                                          443.Player: I read 'The Legend of Ansur'.                                           • •
                                            450.Duke Ulder Ravengard: It's no legend. Ansur does sleep beneath the Rock and will come to the city's aid when it is in need. He is oathbound to do so.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c014cd22-49de-d750-734e-2f410618cdc6Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h40e681a8gd687g42aag8a99g27ac7aff7924Text UUID: 405cc284-e17f-405f-9c3c-9bb73a08b396Timeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c014cd22-49de-d750-734e-2f410618cdc6Timeline Phase Duration: 13.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                        • +
                                          446.Player: Balduran is still with us. He is the mind flayer that protects our minds from the Absolute.CAMP_Ravengard_Event_WyllDecision!CAMP_Ravengard_Event_ToldAboutBalduranCAMP_Ravengard_Event_ToldAboutBalduran

                                          Flags and Tags

                                          • +
                                            403.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Gods, can it be - the man who raised the city's walls became an illithid?

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ae040206-9341-0d56-93d3-728738f12607Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hc917f17egc781g41b3g865bga070ef1ad1b4Text UUID: 7b8ef402-3f27-47d7-90c6-9d500f5198afTimeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ae040206-9341-0d56-93d3-728738f12607Timeline Phase Duration: 42.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Group ID: ae040206-9341-0d56-93d3-728738f12607Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              148.Emperors: You both know you owe your lives to me. I am not fallen - I am risen.MINDMELDTELEPATHY

                                              Flags and Tags

                                              tagstype node | speaker 3 Emperors
                                              • MINDMELD {4874959b-4811-4b89-8f55-85fe04fbcd61}
                                              • TELEPATHY {ad247b59-d101-4f04-99ef-471c65678662}

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 407d071c-8f41-e686-f282-1a3c3ac7ba93Speaker: 3 (Emperors)Text Handle: h32ef085dg7bc3g4ed7gbdeega2dfcd3a0493Text UUID: 227965fc-e77c-4162-9bb5-1ab667f722c9Group ID: ae040206-9341-0d56-93d3-728738f12607Group Index: 1
                                              • +
                                                186.Duke Ulder Ravengard: We must make this a secret we carry beyond the grave. No name is more sacred to the city than Balduran's. Not even mine.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 52dad790-8f8f-2b8e-5b45-48158430f5fdSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h7bcb1ae2gdb8cg4710gbb93g6261fadfd723Text UUID: 05ca54c6-7d5a-4718-bb6c-9572d50f48c3Group ID: ae040206-9341-0d56-93d3-728738f12607Group Index: 2
                                                • +
                                                  316.Duke Ulder Ravengard: When the people think his name or see his likeness, they must imagine a hero, not a horror.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 84bdc512-d6c2-8f67-11c4-57948065a67cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: haba0f999g47bfg49d4g93c0gd7910b7a658bText UUID: 5d84b026-14f5-4b35-8bd1-1a904a17281aGroup ID: ae040206-9341-0d56-93d3-728738f12607Group Index: 3
                                                  • •
                                                    45.Emperors: How misguided you are.MINDMELDTELEPATHY

                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                    tagstype node | speaker 3 Emperors
                                                    • MINDMELD {4874959b-4811-4b89-8f55-85fe04fbcd61}

                                      471.Player: Leave.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c88f4bf4-0be7-4516-458b-d9c165e924baSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h2ca1e0f9g4902g4921gafccgf9ddf1463ec6Text UUID: e5904aa1-d64d-49cb-9673-654c334fcf7aShow Once: TrueUnmapped Attributes: endnode
                                • +
                                  288.Player: That's a lot to ask. I'll do what I can, but I won't make promises I can't keep.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7d04a4da-5d60-6b72-e54b-9bad420b9783Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: h2396e17dgc0c8g468fg820bgd5e1ceb3a970Text UUID: 0bf601c4-2f8d-4bfa-ae7f-13023440c237Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    453.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Your best is all you can offer. I'll ask for nothing more.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c13d9971-1dcf-4c63-2d23-537ba31e1084Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: hfd3b4030g3b81g4dbcgbaafg971ae82da237Text UUID: b5442a26-297c-4eda-9a0b-f8a8c2404aa5Timeline Phase Index: 101Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c13d9971-1dcf-4c63-2d23-537ba31e1084Timeline Phase Duration: 5.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • See Node 270 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) May the Triad guide you.
                                • +
                                  399.Player: I came here to save my own skin, not this godsforsaken city.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ad5afea7-de7a-6a36-0fb8-3438781df601Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hbc500c43gc151g4df1g9692gf524c1f0befaText UUID: e92e6718-889f-41c1-8960-46cbd178d5e1Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    397.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Fine. As long as you fell the Absolute. I will repair the cracks and craters you leave behind.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ad3264f7-bb68-7700-9793-52d1c17ae1e1Speaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h440a4d35g708ag4401g97a4gd85999d5df29Text UUID: dd569095-fd78-465f-be89-16c754a4eeb3Timeline Phase Index: 35Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ad3264f7-bb68-7700-9793-52d1c17ae1e1Timeline Phase Duration: 13.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • See Node 270 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) May the Triad guide you.
                                • +
                                  145.Player: I don't save cities for free.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3e314216-e3eb-efe8-a180-387268ea4cfeSpeaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hb048804fgdc2cg43d6g8795gd47c1f395a42Text UUID: 8f300188-b8aa-4061-8e1b-41dd0eb33188Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    415.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Of course. The city is wealthy. If you save us, I shall raise a tax in your name. And we shall erect a statue.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b39a5fa8-5f23-42bd-3235-834a873f182bSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h46640003g2c0fg401dga91bge41c6c4c5797Text UUID: d969c856-a5be-48a9-a616-a51aab5560c8Timeline Phase Index: 64Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b39a5fa8-5f23-42bd-3235-834a873f182bTimeline Phase Duration: 16.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • See Node 270 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) May the Triad guide you.
                      • +
                        68.Player: Refuse the Emperor and tell Ravengard to trust you.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1db3403c-4bbb-4a3f-5d95-213df0332c27Speaker: 2 (Player)Text Handle: hd20c391eg9691g4803g8a4dge8c404fbbfccText UUID: e4296e70-0685-433e-a19b-1a2df45a51e2Show Once: True
                        • +
                          360.Duke Ulder Ravengard: Sit in silence while those cultists enslave my city? I'd rather... ugh! My damned head.note: His hand flies to Ravengard's head, then he lowers it.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9beeeafc-39e7-cac4-f057-71942fddf1beSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h3892f9e5g91f1g46degbbecg6f88ee5a0317Text UUID: 09a355d3-145b-4898-9b75-946c8f01dfc5Timeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9beeeafc-39e7-cac4-f057-71942fddf1beTimeline Phase Duration: 23.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 9beeeafc-39e7-cac4-f057-71942fddf1beGroup Index: 0
                          • +
                            309.Duke Ulder Ravengard: *Sigh.* Who would I be to question my saviour? Thanks to you, I think my own thoughts and speak my own words.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 82febfc3-12ca-2a7e-8e68-6dab4fa2d60cSpeaker: 0 (Duke Ulder Ravengard)Text Handle: h772e5efegcc36g41beg92fag0259d248a03fText UUID: 93f211e1-7282-422a-b7b0-e178f4460a10Group ID: 9beeeafc-39e7-cac4-f057-71942fddf1beGroup Index: 1
                            • See Node 219 (Duke Ulder Ravengard) It seems the fate of the city lies in your hands.
